title: Eversource Energy Announces $1.2 Billion At-the-Market Equity Offering Program
text: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eversource Energy announces a $1.2 billion “at-the-market” equity offering program from which it may sell its common shares from time to time.

title: Eversource Energy (ES) CEO Joe Nolan on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 5, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Joe Nolan – President and Chief Executive Officer Jeffery Kotkin – Vice President Investor Relations Philip J. Lembo – Chief Financial Officer John Moreira – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Shar Pourreza – Guggenheim Steve Fleishman – Wolfe Nick Campanella – Credit Suisse Angie Storozynski – Seaport Durgesh Chopra – Evercore Ryan Karnish – JP Morgan Insoo Kim – Goldman Sachs David Arcaro – Morgan Stanley Andrew Weisel – Scotia Julien Dumoulin Smith – Bank of America Ryan Levine – City Sophie Karp – Keybanc Paul Patterson – Glenrock Travis Miller – Morningstar Operator Good morning, ladies and gentlemen.

title: Eversource Energy (ES) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Eversource (ES) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.56% and 15.51%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Eversource Energy Announces Leadership Changes Effective May 4, 2022
text: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES) today announced that Phil Lembo is retiring as Chief Financial Officer and as part of the company's leadership succession plan John Moreira, the company's Senior Vice President and Treasurer, has been elected as Chief Financial Officer, effective today. Lembo, 66, has served as Eversource's Chief Financial Officer since May 2016, and will continue to serve the company until later this year as a non-executive Senior Strategi

title: Eversource Energy Reports First Quarter 2022 Results; Initiates Strategic Review of Offshore Wind Investments
text: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eversource Energy reported first quarter 2022 earnings of $443.4 million, or $1.28 per share, and approval of a common dividend of $0.6375 per share.
